title: Court of record
doc_html:
CHAPTER 2.  SCHEDULING AND CONDUCT OF CASES

Art. 402.  Court of record

A court exercising juvenile jurisdiction is a court of record.

Acts 1991, No. 235, §4, eff. Jan. 1, 1992.
